# Compliance Report — Cold Email Campaign

## Requirements
- Unsubscribe link required in every email
- Physical mailing address required
- Privacy policy link required
- Sender must be identified (full name + company)
- EU/UK contacts require data source disclosure (GDPR Art. 14)
- No LinkedIn automation (manual only)

## Blocked Behaviors
- Sending without unsubscribe
- Contacting suppressed emails
- LinkedIn auto-send
- EU contacts with undocumented data source
- High-risk claims without evidence
